overall.description: A first-person perspective video game scene depicting movement through choppy coastal waters during a heavy storm at dusk. The player swims past rocky cliffs featuring wooden Nordic-style fortifications while rain streaks across the screen and dark purple storm clouds fill the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy coastal waters with cliffside wooden fortifications

agents.ego_description: swimming forward through choppy water toward rocky coastline while maintaining view of wooden structures on the cliff

entered.detail: Nordic-style wooden building with multiple levels built into the rocky cliff face
steep gray stone cliff with patches of brown vegetation
dark purple and gray storm clouds covering the sky with heavy rain visible
dark turbulent water surface with whitecaps and rain splashes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view swimming through stormy coastal waters. A wooden fortification built into a rocky cliff dominates the right side of the frame while heavy rain falls from dark purple storm clouds. The water is choppy with visible whitecaps reflecting the dim dusk light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal waters revealing forested shoreline

events.description: camera pans left revealing dense coniferous forest on the distant left shoreline

agents.ego_description: continuing to swim forward while turning left to survey the forested coastline ahead

entered.detail: dense dark green pine trees covering the distant left shoreline

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans left, the wooden fortification exits the frame and a dense coniferous forest becomes visible on the distant left shore. The rocky cliff recedes into the background on the right while the swimmer continues moving through the rain-churned waters toward the open coastline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through stormy coastal waters that shifts from a close-up view of cliffside fortifications to a wide perspective of a distant forested shoreline. It begins with the camera swimming past a wooden fortification built into a rocky cliff on the right, while heavy rain falls from dark purple storm clouds into choppy, white-capped waters. As the camera pans left, the wooden structure exits the frame and the rocky cliff recedes into the background. The scene then opens up to reveal a dense coniferous forest on the distant left shore before the swimmer continues moving through the rain-churned waters toward the open coastline.
